data.name: My Shy Futanari Succubus
data.detailed_description:
Meet Milly- the adorable succubus who just broke into your house!

Not wanting to upset your girlfriend (and, admittedly, a little intimidated by Milly's mysterious syringe full of glowing pink liquid), you offer to help her find a different guy to mess with.

Explore the town and upset the locals as you befriend a cute and easily flustered succubus~

Features

  • 2 H-Scenes

  • 7500~ words (Around 45 minutes of gameplay)

  • 1 adorable demon girl
data.about_the_game:
Meet Milly- the adorable succubus who just broke into your house!

Not wanting to upset your girlfriend (and, admittedly, a little intimidated by Milly's mysterious syringe full of glowing pink liquid), you offer to help her find a different guy to mess with.

Explore the town and upset the locals as you befriend a cute and easily flustered succubus~

Features

  • 2 H-Scenes

  • 7500~ words (Around 45 minutes of gameplay)

  • 1 adorable demon girl
data.short_description: Short and sweet Visual Novel about a guy teaching a succubus the art of seduction.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
